short_description: Opera PMS not loading guest reservations
description: Front desk agents report that the Opera PMS dashboard is stuck on a loading screen when trying to open today's arrivals list. Multiple workstations affected at the front desk. Guests are waiting to check in.
resolution_notes: Restarted Opera PMS application service on the application server and cleared the session cache. Front desk confirmed reservations loaded normally after restart.

short_description: Unable to check in guest, room status shows dirty
description: Front desk cannot check in a guest because Opera PMS shows the assigned room as 'dirty' even though housekeeping marked it clean an hour ago.
resolution_notes: Housekeeping status had not synced due to a stale cache. Forced a manual room status refresh in Opera PMS and verified the room updated to clean/vacant.

short_description: Opera PMS rate plan missing for upcoming promotion
description: Reservations team cannot find the new summer promotion rate plan in Opera PMS. The rate code was supposedly loaded yesterday by revenue management.
resolution_notes: Rate plan was created in the test environment instead of production. Migrated rate code to production Opera PMS instance and confirmed visibility in booking screen.

short_description: Simphony POS terminal frozen at restaurant
description: The POS terminal at the main restaurant is frozen on the payment screen. Staff cannot process any guest payments, line is building up.
resolution_notes: Terminal had lost connection to the POS controller. Rebooted the terminal and the local POS controller, payments resumed normally.

short_description: Credit card payments failing at pool bar POS
description: Pool bar staff report that credit card transactions are being declined on the Simphony POS even though the card reader appears connected.
resolution_notes: Payment gateway certificate had expired on the terminal. Pushed updated certificate via POS management console and verified test transaction succeeded.

short_description: Menu item prices incorrect on POS
description: Several menu items at the lobby bar are showing outdated prices on the Simphony POS after the new menu rollout this morning.
resolution_notes: Menu price sync job had failed silently overnight. Re-ran the menu sync job manually and verified updated prices reflected on terminal.

short_description: POS receipt printer not printing
description: Receipt printer connected to the breakfast restaurant POS terminal is not printing guest receipts, though kitchen order tickets print fine.
resolution_notes: Receipt printer paper roll was incorrectly loaded. Reloaded paper roll correctly and printed test receipt successfully.

short_description: Booking engine showing no availability for fully open dates
description: Guests calling in say the website booking engine shows 'no rooms available' for dates that have plenty of open inventory in Opera PMS.
resolution_notes: Inventory sync between Opera PMS and the booking engine had stalled due to an API timeout. Restarted the sync connector service and confirmed availability now matches PMS.

short_description: Booking engine confirmation emails not sending
description: Guests who complete a reservation on the booking engine are not receiving confirmation emails, though the booking is created correctly in the system.
resolution_notes: Outbound email relay credentials had expired. Updated SMTP relay credentials in the booking engine configuration and resent a test confirmation successfully.

short_description: Booking engine displaying wrong currency for international guests
description: International guests report the booking engine displays prices in USD instead of their local currency selection.
resolution_notes: Currency conversion service API key had been rotated without updating the booking engine config. Updated the API key and verified currency switching worked correctly.

short_description: Guest WiFi down across entire property
description: Guest WiFi is completely unavailable on all floors. Front desk is receiving multiple complaints from guests unable to connect.
resolution_notes: Core wireless controller had crashed due to a firmware bug. Failed over to the secondary controller and scheduled a firmware patch for the primary unit.

short_description: Guest WiFi slow in conference rooms
description: Conference room WiFi is extremely slow during an ongoing corporate event, guests cannot load video calls.
resolution_notes: Access points in the conference wing were oversubscribed. Added a temporary access point and rebalanced client load across channels.

short_description: Guest WiFi captive portal not loading
description: Guests report the WiFi captive portal login page never loads after connecting to the guest network, even though the connection shows as active.
resolution_notes: Captive portal DNS redirect rule had been misconfigured during a router update. Corrected the redirect rule and verified portal loads on multiple devices.

short_description: WiFi password not working for loyalty members
description: Loyalty program members report their dedicated WiFi access code is not being accepted by the guest WiFi portal.
resolution_notes: Loyalty WiFi access code list had not synced from the CRM. Triggered manual sync and confirmed codes worked for affected guests.

short_description: Guest unable to enter room with key card
description: Guest reports their room key card is not opening the door even after front desk re-encoded it twice.
resolution_notes: Door lock battery was critically low causing intermittent reads. Replaced lock battery and re-encoded key card, confirmed access restored.

short_description: Electronic door lock audit log not syncing
description: Security team reports that several door lock audit logs have not synced to the central security system in over 24 hours.
resolution_notes: Lock gateway on the affected floor had lost network connectivity. Reconnected gateway and triggered manual log upload, confirming logs synced.

short_description: Master key card not working on multiple floors
description: Housekeeping supervisor's master key card is being rejected on floors 3 through 5, but works fine on other floors.
resolution_notes: Access control group permissions for the master key profile were missing floors 3-5 after a system update. Updated access group and reissued key, confirmed working.

short_description: Housekeeping app not showing room assignments
description: Housekeeping staff cannot see their assigned rooms for the day in the mobile housekeeping app, list appears empty for everyone.
resolution_notes: Room assignment batch job that runs nightly had failed due to a database connection timeout. Re-ran the batch job manually and assignments appeared correctly.

short_description: Housekeeping app crashes when marking room clean
description: Housekeeping app crashes consistently whenever staff try to mark a room as 'clean' on Android devices.
resolution_notes: A recent app update introduced a null pointer issue on the room-status update screen. Rolled back to the previous stable app version while a fix is prepared.

short_description: Housekeeping app not syncing with PMS room status
description: Rooms marked clean in the housekeeping app are not updating the room status in Opera PMS, causing front desk to see incorrect status.
resolution_notes: Integration middleware queue between the housekeeping app and PMS had backed up. Cleared the queue backlog and confirmed real-time sync resumed.

short_description: Lost & found item log missing entries in housekeeping app
description: Several lost and found item entries logged yesterday are missing from the housekeeping app's lost and found section.
resolution_notes: Entries had been saved locally on a device with no signal and never synced. Reconnected device to WiFi which triggered successful sync of pending entries.

short_description: Revenue management tool showing stale occupancy data
description: Revenue manager reports the revenue management tool is showing occupancy figures from three days ago instead of real-time data.
resolution_notes: Nightly ETL job feeding occupancy data from Opera PMS had failed silently. Re-ran ETL job manually and verified occupancy figures updated to current data.

short_description: Revenue management tool rate recommendations not generating
description: The revenue management tool has stopped generating automated rate recommendations for the next 30 days.
resolution_notes: Forecasting model service had run out of memory and crashed. Restarted the forecasting service with increased memory allocation and confirmed recommendations resumed.

short_description: Revenue management dashboard charts not rendering
description: Revenue management dashboard shows blank charts for all KPIs after the recent browser update on manager workstations.
resolution_notes: Dashboard charting library was incompatible with the latest browser version. Applied a vendor-provided compatibility patch and confirmed charts rendered correctly.

short_description: CRS not reflecting newly closed-out room types
description: The central reservation system is still allowing bookings for a room type that was closed out for renovation two days ago.
resolution_notes: Inventory closeout had only been applied in Opera PMS, not pushed to CRS due to a failed integration job. Re-triggered the CRS sync job and confirmed room type closed.

short_description: CRS double-booking same room across channels
description: Two different OTA channels both show the same room as available and a guest was double-booked through CRS for the same dates.
resolution_notes: CRS inventory allocation buffer had been set incorrectly after a configuration change. Corrected allocation rules and manually resolved the double booking with the guest.

short_description: CRS integration delay with third-party OTA
description: Reservations made on a major OTA are taking over an hour to appear in the central reservation system instead of near real-time.
resolution_notes: OTA integration connector had hit an API rate limit. Adjusted polling interval and requested a rate limit increase from the OTA, confirming delay resolved.

short_description: Spa booking module not showing available appointment slots
description: Guests trying to book a spa treatment online see no available slots even though the spa calendar has several open appointments.
resolution_notes: Spa booking module's calendar cache had not refreshed after staff scheduling changes. Cleared cache and forced refresh, confirming slots displayed correctly.

short_description: Spa booking confirmation not linking to guest folio
description: Spa treatments booked through the spa module are not appearing on the guest's room folio in Opera PMS for billing.
resolution_notes: Folio posting interface between the spa module and PMS had an authentication token expire. Renewed the integration token and confirmed charges posted to folio.

short_description: Activities booking page throwing error on submit
description: Guests attempting to book a property activity (e.g., kayak tour) receive a generic error message when clicking the submit button.
resolution_notes: A required field validation rule was misconfigured after a recent update, rejecting valid submissions. Fixed validation logic and confirmed bookings submitted successfully.

short_description: Spa booking module slow to load on mobile
description: Guests report the spa and activities booking page takes over 30 seconds to load on mobile devices.
resolution_notes: Unoptimized images on the booking page were causing excessive load times. Compressed and resized images, reducing load time to under 3 seconds.

short_description: Accounts payable module rejecting vendor invoice uploads
description: Finance team cannot upload vendor invoices to the accounts payable module, system returns a generic upload error every time.
resolution_notes: File upload size limit had been reduced during a recent server configuration change. Restored the correct upload size limit and confirmed invoices uploaded successfully.

short_description: Finance system showing incorrect tax calculation
description: Monthly financial report shows incorrect tax calculations for food and beverage outlets compared to expected tax rates.
resolution_notes: Tax rate table had not been updated after a regional tax rate change. Updated tax configuration table and reprocessed the affected report.

short_description: Back-office finance system login failures for new users
description: Two newly onboarded finance team members are unable to log into the back-office finance system, receiving 'invalid credentials' errors.
resolution_notes: New user accounts had been created in the wrong active directory group, blocking finance system SSO access. Corrected group membership and confirmed successful login.

short_description: Finance system month-end close report generation fails
description: The month-end close report job fails partway through with a timeout error, blocking the finance team's close process.
resolution_notes: Report query had grown inefficient due to data volume growth and was timing out. Optimized the underlying query and added an index, completing the report successfully.

short_description: Opera PMS group block not releasing rooms after cutoff
description: A group reservation block was supposed to auto-release unsold rooms after the cutoff date, but the rooms remain held in Opera PMS.
resolution_notes: Auto-release scheduled job for the group block had not been enabled correctly. Manually released the rooms and corrected the job configuration for future blocks.

short_description: POS unable to apply loyalty discount at checkout
description: Front desk and restaurant staff report the POS system is not applying loyalty member discounts automatically at checkout.
resolution_notes: Loyalty discount rule engine had a misconfigured tier mapping after a recent loyalty program update. Corrected tier mapping and validated discount applied correctly.

short_description: Booking engine payment gateway timeout during checkout
description: Several guests report the booking engine times out during the final payment step, though their cards are not charged.
resolution_notes: Payment gateway provider was experiencing intermittent latency. Increased gateway timeout threshold and added retry logic, confirming successful checkouts resumed.

short_description: Guest WiFi captive portal showing expired terms and conditions
description: Guests connecting to WiFi see an outdated terms and conditions page referencing a property that was rebranded last year.
resolution_notes: Captive portal content had not been updated after the property rebrand. Updated portal content with current branding and terms, verified on test device.

short_description: Door lock system reporting false low battery alerts
description: Security team is receiving low battery alerts for several door locks that had their batteries replaced last week.
resolution_notes: Battery sensor firmware bug was causing incorrect readings after replacement. Applied vendor firmware patch to affected locks and cleared false alerts.

short_description: Housekeeping app unable to log lost room inspection results
description: Housekeeping supervisors cannot submit room inspection checklists in the app for the executive floor rooms specifically.
resolution_notes: Executive floor rooms were missing from the inspection checklist template mapping. Updated template mapping to include executive floor and confirmed submissions worked.

short_description: Revenue management tool unauthorized access alert
description: Security monitoring flagged an unusual login attempt to the revenue management tool from an unrecognized IP address.
resolution_notes: Investigation confirmed a former employee's account had not been deactivated after offboarding. Disabled the account immediately and forced password reset on related accounts.

short_description: CRS rate parity mismatch with brand website
description: Revenue team noticed rates shown on the central reservation system do not match rates on the brand's main website for the same dates.
resolution_notes: A rate update had been pushed to CRS but not propagated to the brand website cache. Forced cache refresh on brand website and confirmed rate parity restored.

short_description: Spa booking module double-charging guest credit card
description: A guest was charged twice for the same spa appointment booked through the online spa booking module.
resolution_notes: A retry mechanism in the payment integration had a bug causing duplicate charge submissions on slow network responses. Issued refund to guest and deployed fix to prevent duplicate retries.

short_description: Finance system unable to export report to Excel
description: Finance analysts report that exporting reports to Excel from the back-office finance system produces a corrupted file.
resolution_notes: Export module had a formatting bug introduced in the last release. Rolled back export module to previous version and confirmed exports opened correctly in Excel.

short_description: Opera PMS night audit process failing
description: The nightly audit run in Opera PMS failed to complete, leaving room statuses and folios in an inconsistent state this morning.
resolution_notes: Night audit batch job failed due to a locked database table from an unrelated long-running report. Killed the blocking process and re-ran night audit successfully.

short_description: POS inventory counts not matching kitchen stock
description: Restaurant manager reports POS system inventory counts for key ingredients do not match actual kitchen stock after last night's service.
resolution_notes: POS inventory deduction rule for combo menu items was not deducting sub-ingredients correctly. Corrected recipe mapping and reconciled inventory counts.

short_description: Booking engine mobile site layout broken
description: Guests browsing the booking engine on mobile phones report the page layout is broken, with overlapping buttons and text.
resolution_notes: A recent CSS deployment introduced a responsive layout regression. Rolled back the CSS changes and verified mobile layout rendered correctly across devices.

short_description: Guest WiFi bandwidth throttled incorrectly for suite guests
description: Suite guests, who are entitled to premium WiFi bandwidth, report speeds identical to standard rooms.
resolution_notes: Bandwidth profile assignment for suite room WiFi accounts had reverted to default after a controller update. Reassigned correct bandwidth profiles and verified speeds improved.

short_description: Door lock system fails to provision new guest key after room change
description: When a guest is moved to a different room, the door lock system frequently fails to provision the new room's key card on the first attempt.
resolution_notes: Room change events were not always triggering the key provisioning webhook due to a timing race condition. Added a retry delay to the provisioning call and confirmed reliability improved.

short_description: Housekeeping app push notifications not arriving
description: Housekeeping staff are not receiving push notifications for new urgent cleaning requests, though requests appear when manually refreshing the app.
resolution_notes: Push notification service certificate had expired. Renewed push notification certificate and confirmed notifications delivered immediately on test request.

short_description: Revenue management tool incorrect competitor rate data
description: Revenue manager noticed competitor rate shopping data in the tool has not updated in five days, affecting pricing decisions.
resolution_notes: Third-party rate shopping data feed had changed their API response format without notice. Updated the data parser to match new format and confirmed feed resumed updating.

short_description: CRS unable to process group rooming list upload
description: Group coordinator's rooming list spreadsheet upload to the central reservation system fails with a generic processing error every time.
resolution_notes: Spreadsheet contained a date format incompatible with the CRS importer. Provided corrected template to coordinator and successfully processed the rooming list upload.

short_description: Opera PMS reports module exporting blank PDFs
description: Front office manager cannot generate daily arrivals PDF report from Opera PMS, exported file is blank.
resolution_notes: PDF rendering engine ran out of temp disk space. Cleared temp directory and re-ran export successfully.

short_description: POS Simphony offline mode not syncing after reconnect
description: Restaurant POS went into offline mode during a network blip and orders taken offline did not sync once connection returned.
resolution_notes: Offline transaction queue had a corrupted entry blocking the sync. Removed corrupted entry and resynced remaining orders successfully.

short_description: Booking engine availability calendar shows wrong month
description: Guests report the booking engine date picker defaults to the wrong month after the recent daylight saving time change.
resolution_notes: Timezone handling bug surfaced after DST change. Deployed timezone library patch and confirmed calendar displayed correct month.

short_description: Guest WiFi onboarding SMS verification not arriving
description: Guests selecting SMS verification to join WiFi are not receiving the verification code text message.
resolution_notes: SMS gateway provider had an account billing issue suspending messages. Resolved billing issue with provider and confirmed SMS delivery resumed.

short_description: Door lock mobile key (digital key) fails on iOS app
description: Guests using the digital key feature in the mobile app to unlock their room report repeated failures on iOS devices only.
resolution_notes: Bluetooth pairing library had a compatibility issue with latest iOS release. Deployed app patch for Bluetooth handling and confirmed digital key worked on iOS.
